data.title: Director Danièle Bergeron resigns from Colabor Group Inc. after accepting a position with another company. (Characters: 108)
data.description: In Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Quebec, on December 5, 2025, Colabor Group Inc. (TSX: GCL) disclosed that Ms. Danièle Bergeron has stepped down from her role as director with the company. This decision comes after Bergeron secured a new position at a prominent firm.

data.title: Sable Resources Ltd. adopts new Equity Incentive Plan after near unanimous shareholder approval at annual meeting.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Dec. 5, 2025, Sable Resources Ltd. (TSXV: SAE | OTCQB: SBLRF) announced that shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a new omnibus equity incentive plan at their annual general and special meeting. The plan was passed near unanimously, along with other agenda items such as maintaining a five-member board, re-electing directors, and appointing BDO Canada LLP as auditor.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine (Nasdaq: CMND) informed of Nasdaq non-compliance as stock bid price stayed below $1 for 30 days.
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada, on December 5, 2025, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), (FSE: CWY0) disclosed their receipt of a written notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC indicating non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The notice stated the Company’s closing bid price for common shares had been below $1.00 per share for the past 30 consecutive business days. Clearmind is a clinical-stage biotech firm specializing in developing innovative neuroplastogen-derived therapeutics for untreated health issues.

data.title: Fly-E Group, Inc. received delinquency notice from Nasdaq for delayed Form 10-Q filing since 9/30/25.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Fly-E Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLYE) disclosed that they were in violation of Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) of Nasdaq due to their failure to promptly submit the Form 10-Q for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025. The company, a prominent electric vehicle firm specializing in smart electric motorcycles, bikes, and scooters, received a written notification regarding this lapse from Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications staff on November 25. This notification serves as a reminder of the Company's requirement to meet regulatory filing obligations and maintain compliance with Nasdaq standards.

data.title: Rocket Doctor AI appoints Christopher Cherry as Interim CFO on Dec 8, 2025, replacing David Worner.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on December 5, 2025, Rocket Doctor AI Inc. (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) revealed that Christopher Cherry will become the Interim Chief Financial Officer, taking over from David Worner starting December 8, 2025.

data.title: Skyharbour Resources Ltd. closes $2.1M private placement, mostly by institutional investors, for 2026 uranium exploration campaign.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 5th, 2025, Skyharbour Resources Ltd. revealed the closure of a non-brokered private placement financing, yielding a total of CAD $2,103,898.94 in gross proceeds. The majority of the Private Placement was secured by a group of strategic institutional investors. The funds obtained will primarily be allocated to the planned 2026 exploration initiative of the Company, focusing on exploration activities and drilling efforts at its key Russell (“RL”) and Moore Lake Uranium Projects.

data.title: AES declares $0.17595 per share dividend payable on Feb 13, 2026 to shareholders of record on Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: The Board of Directors of The AES Corporation, based in Arlington, Virginia, recently announced their decision to declare a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share. This dividend will be payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026. This information was unveiled on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Planet Fitness secures $750M in financing through Class A-2 Fixed Rate Senior Secured Notes.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Planet Fitness, Inc. disclosed the pricing of $750 million worth of Series 2025-1 Class A-2 Fixed Rate Senior Secured Notes. This offering comprised two tranches. The Class A-2 Notes were issued by the Company and its subsidiaries.

data.title: Casting Networks releases new casting calls in NYC for acting jobs, catering to SAG-AFTRA members and non-union actors.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Casting Networks released a new set of casting calls in New York, reinforcing its position as a leading platform offering a wide range of top-notch opportunities. The latest casting calls cater to both SAG-AFTRA members and non-union actors. This announcement showcases the platform's commitment to providing diverse and high-quality casting opportunities in the industry.
CANADA SAYS IT HAS REMOVED SYRIA FROM CANADA’S LIST OF FOREIGN STATE SUPPORTERS OF TERRORISM
CANADA GOVERNMENT: REMOVED HAY'AT TAHRIR AL-SHAM (HTS) FROM LIST OF TERRORIST ENTITIES UNDER THE CANADIAN CRIMINAL CODE

data.title: LibertyStream offers $10 million in non-brokered LIFE offering of units at $0.65 per share, with one warrant included.
data.description: Dallas-based LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. is excited to unveil a non-brokered private placement offering, with units priced at $0.65 each, aiming to raise up to $10,000,000. Each Unit will include one common share and one whole common share purchase warrant. The company trades on TSXV under the symbol LIB, on OTCQB as VLTLF, and on FSE as I2D.

data.title: J.McLaughlin's holiday fête on Lexington Avenue hosted by Selby Drummond, Will Kahn & Walker Ward in support of Monday Night Hospitality.
data.description: On the evening of December 5, 2025, J.McLaughlin marked the start of the holiday season at its flagship store on Lexington Avenue in New York. The event was a festive celebration hosted by Selby Drummond, Will Kahn, and influencer Walker Ward. Walker Ward made a grand entrance dressed as Santa in a unique toile suit. The event garnered attention due to this unusual arrival and set a joyful tone for the holiday season.

data.title: SentinelOne's stock dropped after beating earnings but missing guidance; revenue was $258.91M, earnings per share 7 cents.
data.description: Cybersecurity company SentinelOne reported third-quarter adjusted earnings of 7 cents per share, beating expectations of 5 cents per share, and generated $258.91 million in revenue, exceeding the consensus target of $257.7 million. Total revenue saw a 23% increase from the previous year, with customers bringing in $100,000 or more annually growing by 20% to 1,572. However, guidance for the fourth quarter fell short as the company projected sales to reach around $271 million, disappointing analysts expecting $273.09 million, leading to a significant drop in S stock. Despite management's emphasis on growing demand for their AI-native security platform, shareholders focused on the underwhelming guidance, causing a 7% and 13% decline in afterhours and open-market sessions, respectively. The volatility in the stock following the guidance miss showcases the concept of heteroskedasticity, where events trigger price fluctuations and uncertain outcomes, but volatility eventually stabilizes. The situation presents an opportunity for speculators looking forward to potential upsides in the future.

data.title: Mr. Drain Plumbing in Sacramento concludes successful "Flush Away Hunger" food drive, rallying support for families in need.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on December 5, 2025, Mr. Drain Plumbing has joyfully declared the positive conclusion of its first-ever Flush Away Hunger canned food drive. This initiative brought together customers and employees in a competition to aid families during the Thanksgiving season.

data.title: Richmond American Homes of Tennessee, Inc. acquires 191 new homesites at Hickory Pointe in Dickson, TN for flexible floor plans.
data.description: A builder in DICKSON, Tenn., known for its flexible floor plans catering to different lifestyles, Richmond American Homes of Tennessee, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., recently acquired and finalized the purchase of 191 homesites on Dec. 5, 2025.

data.title: USCB Financial Holdings sells $44.6M portfolio to boost profits and EPS growth.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. revealed that it had sold $44.6 million worth of available-for-sale securities (AFS). This move by the holding company for U.S. Century Bank was made to enhance future earnings, boost earnings per share (EPS), and bolster overall profitability.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals grants 69,200 stock options and 11,400 restricted stock units to 3 new employees in Nov 2025.
data.description: South San Francisco, California, and San Diego witnessed an announcement from ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC) on December 5, 2025. The clinical stage oncology firm, dedicated to creating treatments combating therapeutic resistance mechanisms, revealed the granting of 69,200 non-qualified stock options and 11,400 restricted stock units on December 1, 2025. These were awarded to three fresh non-executive employees hired by ORIC in November 2025.

data.title: Parsons chosen to lead $441 million I-70 Rocheport to Columbia project in Missouri, teaming up with Emery Sapp & Sons.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Parsons Corporation revealed that they had been chosen by the Missouri Highways and Transportation Commission to work on the Interstate 70 Rocheport to Columbia Design-Build project. This project will be carried out in partnership with Emery Sapp & Sons (ESS). Parsons Corporation, listed under NYSE as PSN, will spearhead the project alongside ESS, showcasing their combined expertise and capabilities in delivering high-quality infrastructure projects. This selection marks a significant milestone for both companies and highlights their commitment to improving transportation infrastructure in Missouri.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics grants stock options to one new employee under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FULC) based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in developing small molecules for rare genetic diseases, revealed the granting of non-statutory stock options to a new employee. This move involved granting stock options for purchasing company common stock, as per the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This action was taken as an inducement to facilitate the new employee's recruitment to Fulcrum, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
